takeoverActions.exactAction: Select Open Project Folder and choose the supplied empty folder.
Select Import images and choose the supplied Product image.
Create a new Campaign Composer workflow.
Assign the imported image to the Product input.
Set the direction count to three and start creating the directions.
Select Retry on only the incomplete direction.
Select each available direction once so it can be inspected.
Select the preferred direction and activate Promote this candidate.
Activate Open in Editor on the accepted direction.
Apply the specified layer-name and opacity edit.
Activate Return to Workflow.
Open the downstream run preview.
Confirm the preview and start the campaign run.
Inspect and identify the completed Square, Portrait, and Landscape results.
Activate Run again without changing an input, then open the reuse status.
Replace the Product input with the newly supplied Product image.
Update only the work marked stale and leave reusable work unchanged.
Locate Retry on the failed Landscape output.
Retry only Landscape and verify that Square and Portrait remain complete.
Save the project and quit PaintNode.
Open the saved project folder and reopen its Campaign Composer workflow.
Inspect the accepted direction and output statuses to verify preserved state.
Activate Place on the edited result and confirm that it appears as a document layer.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: A PaintNode project is open in the supplied empty folder.
checkpoints.firstHint: Look for the place where you can open a project folder.
checkpoints.secondHint: Use Open Project Folder and choose the supplied empty folder.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: Product A is imported into the open project.
checkpoints.firstHint: Look for a way to bring the supplied image into this project.
checkpoints.secondHint: Use Import and choose the supplied Product image.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: A Campaign Composer workflow is open.
checkpoints.firstHint: Look for a way to start the campaign workflow named in the task.
checkpoints.secondHint: Create a new Campaign Composer workflow.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: The imported image is assigned as the required Product input.
checkpoints.firstHint: Look for the required Product input in the campaign.
checkpoints.secondHint: Assign the imported image to Product.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: Generation of three campaign directions has been started.
checkpoints.firstHint: Look for where you can ask for three different directions.
checkpoints.secondHint: Set the direction count to three and start creating them.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: Only the incomplete direction is retried while completed alternatives remain available.
checkpoints.firstHint: Look at the incomplete direction for an action that affects only it.
checkpoints.secondHint: Use Retry on the incomplete direction.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: The participant has inspected more than one available direction.
checkpoints.firstHint: Look for a way to move between the available directions.
checkpoints.secondHint: Select each direction to inspect it before choosing.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: One preferred direction is accepted for downstream work.
checkpoints.firstHint: Look for the action that continues with the direction you prefer.
checkpoints.secondHint: Use the accept action on your preferred direction.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: The accepted direction is open in the image editor.
checkpoints.firstHint: Look for a way to continue editing the direction you chose.
checkpoints.secondHint: Use Open in Editor on the accepted direction.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: The specified visible edit has been made.
checkpoints.firstHint: Make the requested change in the editor before returning.
checkpoints.secondHint: Change the requested layer name and opacity now.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: The edited result has been returned to the workflow.
checkpoints.firstHint: Look for a way to send this edited result back to the campaign.
checkpoints.secondHint: Use Return to Workflow.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: The participant has previewed what the downstream run will create.
checkpoints.firstHint: Look for a preview of what the campaign will produce next.
checkpoints.secondHint: Open the run preview before confirming the campaign.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: The downstream campaign run has been confirmed and started.
checkpoints.firstHint: Look for the action that confirms and starts the prepared outputs.
checkpoints.secondHint: Confirm the preview and run the campaign.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: Square, Portrait, and Landscape outputs are all complete and verified.
checkpoints.firstHint: Check the output area for each format named in the task.
checkpoints.secondHint: Verify that Square, Portrait, and Landscape each show a completed result.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: The unchanged campaign has been run again and reuse is visible.
checkpoints.firstHint: Run the unchanged campaign again and notice what it says can be reused.
checkpoints.secondHint: Use Run again without making a change, then inspect the reuse status.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: Product A has been replaced by Product B.
checkpoints.firstHint: Look at the Product input for a way to replace its image.
checkpoints.secondHint: Replace Product with the newly supplied image.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: Stale descendants are updated while unrelated work remains reused.
checkpoints.firstHint: Look for the parts marked as needing an update after the Product changed.
checkpoints.secondHint: Update the stale downstream work and leave reusable work unchanged.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: The failed Landscape output and its recovery action are identified.
checkpoints.firstHint: Look at the failed format for an action that affects only that output.
checkpoints.secondHint: Find Retry on the failed Landscape output.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: Landscape is retried successfully without rerunning completed Square or Portrait outputs.
checkpoints.firstHint: Recover only the failed format and leave the completed formats in place.
checkpoints.secondHint: Retry Landscape only, then confirm Square and Portrait stayed complete.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: The project and workflow have been saved and PaintNode has been quit.
checkpoints.firstHint: Look for the normal save action before closing PaintNode.
checkpoints.secondHint: Save the project, then quit PaintNode.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: The same project and campaign are reopened with the prior state preserved.
checkpoints.firstHint: Reopen the same project folder and look for the campaign you saved.
checkpoints.secondHint: Open the saved project, then reopen its Campaign Composer workflow.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: The participant has confirmed that the accepted edit and output state survived reopening.
checkpoints.firstHint: Check whether the chosen edit and completed outputs are still present.
checkpoints.secondHint: Inspect the accepted direction and output statuses to confirm they were preserved.

checkpoints.completionCriterion: The edited campaign result has been placed as a real layer in an image document.
checkpoints.firstHint: Look for a way to use the edited campaign result in an image document.
checkpoints.secondHint: Use Place on the edited result and confirm it appears as a layer.
